text: Israel says strike targeted the last senior Hamas leader involved in Oct. 7 - The Washington Post
fullText: An Israeli strike in Gaza city Friday targeted Hamas militant leader Izz-al-Din al-Haddad, Israel said. Neither side has confirmed his death.

text: Ebola outbreak kills 65 in eastern DR Congo's Ituri province - BBC
fullText: Africa's top health agency says around 246 cases have been reported - a case has also been reported in Uganda.

text: Supreme Court rejects Virginia’s bid to restore congressional map favoring Democrats - WTOP
fullText: The Supreme Court on Friday rejected Virginia’s bid to restore a congressional map that would have given Democrats a chance to pick up four seats in the closely divided House of Representatives.

text: Live Updates: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran says it "cannot trust the Americans at all" - CBS News
fullText: Two days of talks in Washington between Lebanon and Israel produced an extension of the current ceasefire by 45 days.

text: Texas Children’s will create ‘detransition clinic’ to settle DOJ and state investigation - NBC News
fullText: Texas Children’s Hospital must create the country’s “first-ever detransition clinic,” Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton said in announcing a settlement over transgender healthcare.

text: Colorado governor commutes Trump ally Tina Peters' prison sentence for voting machine tampering - CBS News

text: ‘Love Is Blind’ Seattle couple separates - The Seattle Times

text: Global Bond Selloff Worsens as Rising Oil Prices Spook Investors - Bloomberg.com
fullText: Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US on intensifying fears that the war-driven price shock will force central banks to raise interest rates to contain the impact.
